name: Qualified Plan Parachute Payment Exclusion

eligibility.description: Tax-exempt organizations can structure separation benefits through qualified plans or 403(b)/457(b) vehicles to avoid the excise tax on excess parachute payments.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Payments made under qualified retirement plans, 403(b) annuities, or 457(b) plans are excluded from the definition of 'excess parachute payments' subject to the 21% excise tax.
